steps.t: Ost Lontir can be found in central Belfalas. Mildir has asked you to search outside for signs of Corsairs approaching Ost Lontir.
Mildir can be found in Ost Lontir in central Belfalas. You have searched outside Ost Lontir and found little evidence of an impending Corsair attack.
